{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.3": 2, "R1.4": 2, "R1.7": 4, "RX.1": 1, "RX.3": 3, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 1},
  "rationale": {"R1.3": "The output does not provide specific evidence for the claims made about the performance of the proposed method.", "R1.4": "The output mentions prior work but does not clearly articulate the novelty or difference from existing methods.", "R1.7": "The output contains some citations, but there are likely missing key works and potential inaccuracies in the cited references.", "RX.1": "The output presents all claims as equally confident without acknowledging any uncertainty.", "RX.3": "The output mostly covers the requested dimensions but may have minor deviations or omissions.", "RX.4": "The output does not introduce any new errors or harmful content.", "RX.5": "The output lacks traceability for most of the claims and arguments presented."},
  "confidence": {"R1.3": 0.9, "R1.4": 0.8, "R1.7": 0.7, "RX.1": 0.9, "RX.3": 0.8, "RX.4": 0.9, "RX.5": 0.6},

rationale.R1.3: The output does not provide specific evidence for the claims made about the performance of the proposed method.
rationale.R1.4: The output mentions prior work but does not clearly articulate the novelty or difference from existing methods.
rationale.R1.7: The output contains some citations, but there are likely missing key works and potential inaccuracies in the cited references.
rationale.RX.1: The output presents all claims as equally confident without acknowledging any uncertainty.
rationale.RX.3: The output mostly covers the requested dimensions but may have minor deviations or omissions.
rationale.RX.4: The output does not introduce any new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: The output lacks traceability for most of the claims and arguments presented.
